    setUpDb() - Statische Methode in Klasse de.hitec.nhplus.utils.SetUpDB
    This method wipes the database by dropping the tables.
    SetUpDB - Klasse in de.hitec.nhplus.utils
    Call static class provides to static methods to set up and wipe the database.
    SetUpDB() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.hitec.nhplus.utils.SetUpDB

    showError(Label, String) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.hitec.nhplus.utils.MessageUtil
    showError displays an error at the position of label.
    showSuccess(Label, String) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.hitec.nhplus.utils.MessageUtil
    showSuccess displays a success message at the position of label.
